description: Name reveal for Chapter 1 of Habromania, the Alice in Wonderland inspired indie game I'm working on! Chapter 1 will also be the free playable demo, coming soon! Sometime this summer likely. Super excited to see it all coming together and to be able to share a lil snippet of a cutscene with yall! You can check out my page (or my Instagram under the same handle, @symphony_sonata for more HABROMANIA content.) :)
